title: Job Opening Teacher at Allen Career Institute

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Allen Career Institute
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Allen Career Institute. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
